footer.manifesto: Made with the Deaf community. Tokyo · Worldwide.

meta.title: Ontenna — Sound, made to feel.
meta.description: Ontenna is a wearable haptic device that translates the world's sounds into vibration and light. A device, two apps, and a haptic language built for Deaf and hard-of-hearing people.

hero.subtitle: Ontenna is a wearable that translates the world's sounds into vibration and light. A device, two apps, and a haptic language built for people who hear with their body.
hero.note: The Ontenna apps require the Ontenna haptic device. Sold separately.
hero.flow: Audio in · vibration out · light out

steps.title: Three steps. One sense.
steps.s1Body: Clip Ontenna to your hair, ear, collar, or clothes. It weighs almost nothing.
steps.s2Body: Vibration and light translate sound around you in real time, on your body.
steps.s3Body: An app dedicated to the haptic language of Ontenna — feel rhythm, attention, music.

device.title: Hardware-first by design.
device.body: The Ontenna app does not work without the wearable connected. This is a deliberate identity decision. The body is the screen.

ecosystem.title: One wearable, two apps.
ecosystem.iphoneBody: One Ontenna paired to your iPhone. Alerts, Symphony, Sports, live Transcription, and Train.
ecosystem.ipadBody: One iPad orchestrates up to 20 Ontennas through the Ontenna Gateway, in classrooms and live shows.

sounds.title: Listening 24/7, on your terms.
sounds.body: Alerts run on the Ontenna's own microphone — never your iPhone's — recognizing 50+ sounds across about 10 categories. Each one fires its own vibration pattern and color.

symphony.title: Feel the music, one instrument at a time.
symphony.body: Symphony splits a song into stems — drums, bass, vocals, piano, guitar — each with its own vibration, synced to Spotify or Apple Music. Eight modes, and with Suit mode up to 7 Ontennas spread the music across your whole body.

manifesto.body: We build hardware for the senses people already have. Ontenna is universal by design, built with the Deaf community, and made to put the world back inside your body.

slider.worn: Clip it on. Feel your world.
slider.device: Ontenna Pro — clip, controls, vibration & light.

press.title: As featured around the world.
press.intro: A decade of coverage and awards — from global tech press to Japan's top design honors. Tap any logo to read the story.
